title: 90ML
subTitle: A man with fetal alcohol syndrome keeps himself alive by drinking a certain amount of alcohol. However, things change when he falls in love with a beautiful woman.

title: Good Newwz
subTitle: Two married couples are unsuccessful in conceiving and seek medical treatment. However, they end up in a complicated situation after their doctor makes a blunder.

title: Gangs of Madras
subTitle: A distraught woman decides to exact revenge on the ruthless gangsters who framed her husband during a police encounter, making her lose him and her unborn baby.

title: Cycle Kick
subTitle: The lives of two brothers change when they find an abandoned bicycle. However, their happiness is short-lived when the two-wheeler is stolen from them.

title: Aranya
subTitle: Devastated by a minister's plans to raze a thriving forest and turn it into an urban settlement, a lone man decides to protect the jungle and its residents.

title: The Bhootnii
subTitle: After a heartbreak, Shantanu unknowingly summons a spirit named Mohabbat, whose obsessive presence begins to disrupt the peace of the entire college campus.

title: Aranmanai 4
subTitle: Suspicious about his sister's death, Saravanan, a lawyer, tries to solve the mystery behind it, only to discover a mysteriously dark force at play.

title: Game Changer
subTitle: In the midst of a power struggle for the chief minister's post, an upstanding IPS officer enters the fray of politics to fight against its corrupt system.

title: Crew
subTitle: Three ambitious female cabin attendants from Mumbai get caught in a web of lies during their pursuit of dreams, leading to an unexpected heist.

title: Pushpa 2: The Rule
subTitle: A powerful smuggler goes head-to-head with a vengeful enemy while controlling politics and managing high-stakes confrontations. A public apology sparks a tense showdown, culminating in a challenge.

title: Antim: The Final Truth
subTitle: Rahul runs away from his poverty-stricken village life to become a gangster in the city. There, he locks horns with an upstanding policeman who tries to set him on the right path.

title: Antim: The Final Truth
subTitle: Rahul runs away from his poverty-stricken village life to become a gangster in the city. There, he locks horns with an upstanding policeman who tries to set him on the right path.

title: Raangi
subTitle: Thaiyal Nayagi tries to protect her niece from an online predator. However, things escalate when the FBI's attempt to catch the culprit puts them both in danger as they unwittingly become bait.

title: Siddhu The Warrior
subTitle: A rich man does everything he can to restore his mother's failing health. However, finding no success, he follows the advice of a sage who tells him to turn into a beggar for 48 hours.

title: Khel A Team to Play
subTitle: Two rival brothers face off against each other as coaches from opposite teams to win the annual village football tournament.

title: Om Bheem Bush
subTitle: Three scientists arrive at a village in search of a treasure. However, things take a turn when they explore a haunted palace and discover black magic.

title: Entertainment
subTitle: Akhil, an underdog and a failure, comes to know that his real father is a rich diamond merchant who has just passed away. When he goes to retrieve his wealth, he learns that a dog has inherited it.

title: Bajrangi Bhaijaan
subTitle: Pawan Chaturvedi rises above the divisive bounds of nationality and religion to help a little Pakistani girl stranded in India.

title: Sikandar
subTitle: A passionate young man faces off against a corrupted system, challenging the existing authorities and injustice that take away the rights of common people.

title: Baby John
subTitle: An indomitable policeman goes to greater lengths and leads a double life in order to protect his daughter from the criminal underworld.

title: Hum Aapke Hain Kaun
subTitle: A man and a woman fall in love, but fate intervenes when she has to marry his older brother for the good of their families.

title: Tees Maar Khan
subTitle: Having escaped from abusive households, Tees Maar Khan and Vasudha form a familial bond. Years later, a tragedy involving the mafia leaves Tees Maar Khan vying for revenge.

title: Tees Maar Khan
subTitle: Having escaped from abusive households, Tees Maar Khan and Vasudha form a familial bond. Years later, a tragedy involving the mafia leaves Tees Maar Khan vying for revenge.

title: Saaho
subTitle: An undercover agent and his partner go after a thief who has stolen 2,000 crore rupees. Soon, they realise that the case is linked to the death of a crime lord and an emerging gang war.

title: Saina
subTitle: Professional badminton player Saina Nehwal wins more than 24 international titles and achieves the top world spot in 2015.

title: Cycle Kick
subTitle: The lives of two brothers change when they find an abandoned bicycle. However, their happiness is short-lived when the two-wheeler is stolen from them.

title: IPC 376
subTitle: A police officer looks into an informer who can predict future murders in a mysterious way. Soon, she unearths a sinister murder mystery that leads to a shocking truth.

title: Aravinda Sametha
subTitle: A young man sets out to avenge his father's death but soon realises that violence is not the key to his salvation. His life changes when he meets another man, who helps him rediscover himself.

title: Andaaz
subTitle: After his sweetheart Kajal marries another man, Raj moves to Cape Town. He eventually agrees to marry Jiya but is shocked to find that she is Kajal's widowed sister-in-law.

title: Gangubai Kathiawadi
subTitle: A woman is forced to abandon her Bollywood dreams after her boyfriend sells her to a brothel. As time passes, she builds strong connections in the criminal underworld and rises to power.

title: Dabangg 2
subTitle: Inspector Chulbul Pandey oversees the operations of the local police station in Kanpur. However, things take a turn when he kills the brother of a local politician.

title: Zee Cinema HD
subTitle: Zee Cinema HD

title: Koi ... Mil Gaya
subTitle: A young man with special needs is influenced by his father's scientific work. He encounters an alien who grants him extraordinary abilities and transforms his life.

title: Valimai
subTitle: Arjun, a police officer, sets out on a mission to hunt down a group of violent bikers after they are involved in a theft and murder. When a city's crime rate rises, it is up to Arjun, a police officer, to restore order.
